title: CredentialsStore — @Observable credential state with persistent backing
description: Implement CredentialsStore.swift as an @Observable final class. Properties: baseURL (UserDefaults key aggregator.baseURL, default https://aggregator-api.renaliaslabs.net/api/v1), clientId (Keychain key aggregator.clientId, default ""), clientSecret (Keychain key aggregator.clientSecret, default ""). Computed isConfigured: Bool — true when all three are non-empty. All properties read from backing store at init. didSet observers persist changes immediately. Add a test initialiser that accepts injectable in-memory storage backends (protocol or closure-based) so unit tests avoid real Keychain/UserDefaults. Update AggregatorApp.swift to instantiate CredentialsStore as @State and inject via .environment(credentialsStore).
acceptance_criteria: baseURL defaults to https://aggregator-api.renaliaslabs.net/api/v1 on first launch
clientId and clientSecret default to empty string on first launch
isConfigured is true only when all three properties are non-empty strings
didSet on baseURL writes to UserDefaults key aggregator.baseURL
didSet on clientId and clientSecret writes to Keychain via KeychainHelper
A test-only initialiser exists that accepts injectable in-memory backing, not real Keychain/UserDefaults
AggregatorApp.swift creates CredentialsStore as @State and injects it into the environment
